/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/ConnectionPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/EchoServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/Epoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/HttpRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/HttpResponse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/InetAddress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/Socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/echo_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o echo_server   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-client/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-client/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libmysqlclient.dylib -lpthread
